subject: AP Chemistry

units.name: Molecular and Ionic Compound Structure and Properties

notes: Only strict-gated scored exam/practice-exam items are published.
Unscored, field-test, and non-exam items are excluded before publishing.

unit_classification_authority.official_framework: AP Chemistry Course and Exam Description
unit_classification_authority.policy: Official exam and subject framework materials are the only authority for unit classification.
unit_classification_authority.student_progression_rule: A question belongs to the earliest unit after which a student can answer it using that unit and prior units only.
